# Java 21 to 25 Migration

Validate toolchain, framework BOM, and runtime images before changing source.

## Gradle Toolchain

```kotlin
java {
    toolchain {
        languageVersion = JavaLanguageVersion.of(25)
    }
}
```

## Maven

```xml
<properties>
  <maven.compiler.release>25</maven.compiler.release>
</properties>
```

## Checklist

- Toolchain support for Java 25 in Gradle wrapper and Maven plugins
- Framework and plugin compatibility with target JDK
- Deprecated or removed APIs flagged by compiler
- Runtime image support (`eclipse-temurin:25-jre` or org standard)
- Performance-sensitive code re-benchmarked after upgrade

## Compiler Warnings as Migration Signals

```bash
./gradlew compileJava -Xlint:deprecation
```

```bash
mvn -q -DcompilerArgument=-Xlint:deprecation compile
```

## Keep Language Modernization Separate

First make the project compile and test cleanly on Java 25. Then adopt new language features in follow-up changes.

## Verification

```bash
./gradlew clean test
# or
mvn -q clean verify
```

Confirm CI agent, Docker base image, and production runtime all target Java 25.
